notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly public/visible events (appearances, trades, titles) from an auction scene. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The entities and events are all publicly observable (白光刀客/魏央 appearing, 方正 being called '老弟', loans of 元老蛊, etc.). There is no hidden fact that can be extracted without speculation or extrapolation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly character introductions, appearances, and trade events. Observed actions are limited to lending money (魏央, 商心慈), inviting guests (商睚眦 inviting 巨开碑), and bidding behavior (商睚眦 raising price on 白凝冰). No clear observed motive with direct source support for a one-step cautious inference.商螭吻 'hesitated and did not take out yuanlao gu' (ptr_11) shows hesitation but motive is ambiguous.商睚眦's price-raising on 白凝冰 could be interpreted as hostility but the seed does not directly state intent. Insufficient evidence for a non-ambiguous motive inference.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed contains many individual persons (商睚眦, 商赑屃, 商螭吻, 商蒲牢, 商狻猊, 商嘲风, etc.) who are members of the 商 family, but no collective faction/group pressure is clearly source-backed. The 商 family as a whole is not shown acting collectively or having a unified stake in the seed facts. Individual 商 clan members have personal interactions (inviting 巨开碑, lending money, watching auctions) but these do not constitute a faction-level pressure. The 商家五干将 (five generals) is mentioned but only as a title for 白光刀客/魏央, with no collective action or stake shown. No named collective actor (family, clan, faction) has a concrete stake in the seed facts that would support a faction pressure candidate.
